Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(CASE WHEN (up.applicability = true) THEN up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" ELSE bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" END * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh", sum(CASE WHEN (up.applicability = true) THEN up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" ELSE bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" END * bs.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs LEFT OUTER JOIN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS up ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" = up."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" AND bs.state = up.state AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND up.upgrade = 1 AND up.applicability = true 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/caca487643582bc348811f2768176f516769b70ba830b1f4e01a1ed77afa5eb1/4b0b62a4-80d9-400a-8ead-8783c5c73b1a/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
